# Webmaster Droid LLM Index (full)

## Product intent

Webmaster Droid enables non-technical website operators to make quick, reliable website changes in plain language.

## Priority audience

1. Non-technical editors and operators
2. Developers integrating or migrating websites

## Capability claims (must be runtime-truthful)

- content edits in draft
- theme/style token edits where available
- image generation where configured
- existing-image editing where configured
- vision-assisted context for visual requests

Always verify runtime capabilities from `GET /api/models` before claiming support in UI responses.

## Safety model

- draft-first mutations
- checkpoint history
- explicit publish
- rollback support

## Canonical files

- [README](README.md)
- [AGENTS guide](AGENTS.md)
- [Docs index](docs/index.md)
- [Value proposition](docs/value-proposition.md)
- [Non-technical journey](docs/user-journeys/non-technical-editor.md)
- [Non-technical quickstart](docs/getting-started/non-technical-quickstart.md)
- [Developer: new build](docs/getting-started/new-build.md)
- [Developer: migrate existing](docs/getting-started/migrate-existing.md)
- [Content edits guide](docs/guides/content-edits.md)
- [Image workflows guide](docs/guides/image-workflows.md)
- [Reliability and safety](docs/guides/reliability-and-safety.md)
- [Optional migration skill guidance](docs/migration/optional-skill.md)
- [API OpenAPI contract](docs/api/openapi.api-aws.yaml)
- [Chat stream event schema](docs/api/chat-stream-events.schema.json)
- [CLI scan JSON schema](docs/api/cli-output/scan.schema.json)
- [CLI codemod JSON schema](docs/api/cli-output/codemod.schema.json)
- [CLI doctor JSON schema](docs/api/cli-output/doctor.schema.json)

## Skill policy

Migration skill is optional and migration-only:

- `skills/webmaster-droid-convert/SKILL.md`

Do not require skill installation for non-technical editing workflows.
